ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the image file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the image file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the image */,
  "letter" TEXT /* Label or category of the image */,
  "xbox" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "ybox" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "onpix" INTEGER /* On-pixel value indicating some feature presence */,
  "xbar" INTEGER /* Mean x-coordinate for the feature */,
  "ybar" INTEGER /* Mean y-coordinate for the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the processed image */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when processing was performed */,
  "processing_time" TEXT /* Time taken to process the image */,
  "processor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the processor that performed the processing */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the processing (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if processing failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date when the summary was generated */,
  "summary_status" TEXT /* Status of the summary (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "x2bar" INTEGER /* Second moment of x-coordinates */,
  "y2bar" INTEGER /* Second moment of y-coordinates */,
  "xybar" INTEGER /* Covariance of x and y coordinates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_summary_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of edge */,
  "edge_length" INTEGER /* Length of the edge */,
  "xedge" INTEGER /* X-coordinate of detected edges */,
  "yedge" INTEGER /* Y-coordinate of detected edges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_edges_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was captured */,
  "camera_model" TEXT /* Model of the camera used to capture the image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the image was captured */,
  "gps_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates where the image was captured */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that captured the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_processing_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter record */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated image */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the processing parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the parameter */,
  "param_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_processing_parameters_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)
